title: Illusioner added to minecraft
description: This mod will add an unrealized mob, an Illusion, to the game. Now, after you fall asleep on the bed, waking up, there will be an Illusion next to you.
body: This mod will add an unrealized mob, an Illusion, to the game. Now, after you fall asleep on the bed, waking up, there will be an Illusion next to you.
